role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: Under normal market conditions, the manager will pursue its investment objectives by investing in U.S. treasury securities and utilizing an option strategy consisting of purchasing and writing (selling) U.S. exchange-traded call options, including Flexible Exchange options (“FLEX Options”), on the iShares 20+ Year Treasury Bond ETF (the “Underlying ETF”). The fund is non-diversified.

info.longName: FT Vest 20+ Year Treasury & Target Income ETF

funds_data.description: Under normal market conditions, the manager will pursue its investment objectives by investing in U.S. treasury securities and utilizing an option strategy consisting of purchasing and writing (selling) U.S. exchange-traded call options, including Flexible Exchange options (“FLEX Options”), on the iShares 20+ Year Treasury Bond ETF (the “Underlying ETF”). The fund is non-diversified.
